# Fraction — Architecture Reference for LLMs & Coding Agents

> Persistent memory layer for LLM agents. Zero API costs, sub-100ms ingestion, fully offline.
> Package: `fractionally` on PyPI. Import: `from fraction import Memory`

## Overview

Fraction replaces expensive per-call LLM extraction (mem0, supermemory) with learned token-level compression (LLMLingua-2) and 4-signal hybrid retrieval merged via Reciprocal Rank Fusion. All core operations run locally with no API calls.

Two-tier API:
- **Memory** (high-level): Auto-persistence wrapper, managed storage in ~/.fraction/
- **Fraction** (low-level): Core engine with explicit save/load lifecycle

Two extraction modes:
- **LLMLingua-2** (default): BERT-sized model, zero cost, deterministic, sub-100ms
- **LLM extraction**: Any provider via litellm (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, etc.)

---

## File Map

```
fraction/
├── __init__.py        # Package exports, version
├── client.py          # Memory (high-level auto-persistence client)
├── memory.py          # Fraction (low-level core engine)
├── config.py          # FractionConfig (all settings)
├── types.py           # Data models: CompressedFragment, MemoryItem, SearchResult, MemoryEvent
├── compressor.py      # Token compression: LLMLingua2, SelfInfo, Ensemble, LLM extractors
├── embedder.py        # SentenceTransformerEmbedder (BGE-base, 768-dim)
├── entity.py          # spaCy NER entity extraction + relationship triples
├── vector_store.py    # USearchVectorStore (HNSW index + metadata)
├── graph.py           # EntityGraph (in-memory, JSON-persistent)
├── retriever.py       # HybridRetriever (vector + BM25 + graph + temporal → RRF)
├── storage.py         # SQLiteHistory (audit log via SQLAlchemy)
├── utils.py           # generate_id, content_hash, now_utc, format_messages
benchmarks/
├── locomo.py          # LoCoMo benchmark runner
├── metrics.py         # BLEU-1, F1, LLM judge (Likert + binary)
├── prompts.py         # Answer generation + judge prompts
├── generate_dataset.py # Synthetic LoCoMo dataset generator
├── run_benchmarks.py  # CLI entry point with --compressor_type compare mode
```

---

## Data Models (types.py)

```python
CompressedFragment:
    original_text: str
    compressed_text: str
    compression_ratio: float
    token_scores: list[tuple[str, float]]  # (token, importance)
    entities: list[str]

MemoryItem:
    id: str                    # 16-char hex UUID
    content: str               # compressed text
    content_raw: str           # original uncompressed text
    importance_scores: list[tuple[str, float]]
    entities: list[str]
    metadata: dict
    user_id, agent_id, run_id: str | None
    created_at, updated_at: datetime
    hash: str                  # MD5 for dedup

SearchResult:
    id: str
    content: str
    score: float
    metadata: dict
    created_at: datetime

MemoryEvent:
    id, memory_id: str
    event: str                 # ADD | UPDATE | DELETE
    old_content, new_content: str | None
    user_id: str | None
    timestamp: datetime
```

---

## Configuration (config.py)

```python
FractionConfig(
    # Compression
    compressor_type="llmlingua2",   # llmlingua2 | self_info | ensemble | llm
    compression_rate=0.6,           # retain 60% of tokens
    adaptive_compression=True,      # skip compression for ≤20 token texts
    importance_threshold=0.0,

    # LLM extraction (when compressor_type="llm") — uses litellm
    llm_model="gpt-4o-mini",       # any litellm model string
    llm_api_key=None,              # falls back to provider env vars
    llm_api_base=None,             # custom base URL (Ollama, self-hosted)
    llm_extraction_prompt=None,    # custom extraction prompt

    # Relevance gate
    relevance_gate=True,
    min_content_words=3,

    # Embedder
    embedder_model="BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5",
    embedding_dim=768,

    # Vector store
    vector_store_path="fraction_index.usearch",
    metadata_path="fraction_metadata.json",
    metric="cos",
    dtype="f32",

    # Retrieval
    top_k=10,
    use_bm25=True,
    use_graph=True,
    rerank=True,
    duplicate_threshold=0.95,
    min_score_ratio=0.3,

    # RRF
    rrf_k=30,
    rrf_weights=None,             # default: {vector:1.0, bm25:1.2, graph:0.8, temporal:1.0}

    # Entity graph
    entity_similarity_threshold=0.7,

    # Storage
    history_db_path="fraction_history.db",
    default_user_id=None,
)
```

---

## Write Path (Ingestion)

```
User Input (str | list[str] | list[dict])
    ↓ format_messages() → single text string
    ↓ Compressor.compress(text, rate=0.6, adaptive=True)
    ↓   → CompressedFragment {compressed_text, token_scores, compression_ratio}
    ↓ EntityExtractor.extract(compressed_text)
    ↓   → [{"text", "label", "start", "end"}]
    ↓ Relevance Gate: skip if (no entities AND <3 content words)
    ↓ SentenceTransformerEmbedder.embed(compressed_text)
    ↓   → list[float] (768-dim, L2 normalized)
    ↓ USearchVectorStore.search(embedding, limit=1) for dedup
    ↓   → cosine ≥ 0.95 → UPDATE, else → ADD
    ↓ USearchVectorStore.insert/update(embedding, payload)
    ↓ HybridRetriever.add_to_corpus(memory_id, raw_text)  # BM25 index
    ↓ EntityGraph: add entities + co-occurrence edges + relationship triples
    ↓ SQLiteHistory.add_event(ADD|UPDATE)
    ↓ Memory.save() if auto_save
    → Return {id, memory, event, entities, compression_ratio, latency_ms}
```

---

## Read Path (Retrieval)

```
Query string
    ↓ Embed query → 768-dim vector
    ↓ HybridRetriever.retrieve(query, filters, limit)
    │
    ├── Vector Search: USearch cosine similarity
    ├── BM25 Search: BM25Okapi on raw (uncompressed) text corpus
    ├── Graph Search: spaCy NER → EntityGraph.find_entity() → get_related(hops=2)
    └── Temporal Search: regex date extraction, activated on temporal query patterns
    │
    ↓ RRF Fusion: score(doc) = Σ(weight_i / (k + rank_i))
    ↓ Filter: min_score_ratio threshold, deduplication
    → Return top-k SearchResults [{id, content, score, metadata, created_at}]
```

---

## Compression Strategies (compressor.py)

| Strategy | Class | Latency | Cost | Notes |
|----------|-------|---------|------|-------|
| llmlingua2 | LLMLingua2Scorer | 80-150ms | Free | Default. BERT-sized, deterministic. Force-preserves temporal tokens. |
| self_info | SelfInfoScorer | 200-400ms | Free | GPT-2 self-information: I(x) = -log P(x\|context) |
| ensemble | EnsembleScorer | 300-500ms | Free | Weighted combination of multiple scorers |
| llm | LLMExtractorScorer | 500-2000ms | Per-call | Uses litellm. Extracts JSON {facts, entities}. 3x retry. |

Factory: `build_compressor(config: FractionConfig) -> TokenScorer`

Adaptive compression (when enabled):
- ≤20 tokens → rate=1.0 (no compression)
- 21-50 tokens → rate=0.85
- 51-100 tokens → rate=0.7
- >100 tokens → configured rate

---

## Retrieval Signals (retriever.py)

| Signal | Weight | Activation | Scoring |
|--------|--------|------------|---------|
| Vector | 1.0 | Always | Cosine similarity via USearch |
| BM25 | 1.2 | If corpus non-empty | TF-IDF with BM25Okapi, 23-word stoplist |
| Graph | 0.8 | If use_graph=True | Direct match (1.0) + multi-hop (1/(1+distance)) |
| Temporal | 1.0 | If query matches temporal regex | Exact date match (+2.0) + density (+0.1×density) |

RRF: `score(doc) = Σ(weight_i / (rrf_k + rank_i(doc)))`, default rrf_k=30

---

## Entity Graph (graph.py)

- Nodes: `{text, type, memory_ids, aliases}`, fuzzy-merged at 0.85 similarity
- Edges: `{source, target, relation, memory_id}`, relation is "co_occurs" or dependency-parsed verb
- Lookup: `_text_to_id` (text.lower() → node_id), `_adjacency` (BFS)
- Multi-hop: BFS up to 2 hops, score decays by 1/(1+distance)
- Persistence: JSON with set→list conversion

---

## Vector Store (vector_store.py)

- USearch HNSW index, single-file memory-mapped
- Soft deletion via `_deleted` set (avoids full rebuild)
- Over-fetches 3× on search to account for filtered/deleted entries
- Metadata stored per-vector in dict
- Persistence: `.usearch` binary + `_metadata.json`

---

## Storage (storage.py)

- SQLAlchemy ORM with SQLite backend
- Table: `memory_history` (id, memory_id, event, old_content, new_content, user_id, timestamp)
- Events: ADD, UPDATE, DELETE

---

## API Surface

### Memory (client.py) — Recommended

```python
from fraction import Memory, FractionConfig

m = Memory(data_dir="~/.fraction/", config=FractionConfig(...), auto_save=True)

# Write
result = m.add("text or messages", user_id="alice")
m.update(memory_id, "new text")
m.delete(memory_id)
m.delete_all(user_id="alice")

# Read
results = m.search("query", user_id="alice", limit=5)
memory = m.get(memory_id)
all_mems = m.get_all(user_id="alice")
history = m.history(memory_id)

# Context manager
with Memory() as m:
    m.add("fact", user_id="u1")
```

### Fraction (memory.py) — Low-Level

```python
from fraction import Fraction, FractionConfig

f = Fraction(config)
f.add("text", user_id="alice")
results = f.search("query", user_id="alice")
f.save()   # manual persistence
f.load()   # manual loading
f.reset()  # wipe all data
```

---

## Persistence Model

Files per instance:
1. `{vector_store_path}` — USearch binary HNSW index
2. `{metadata_path}` — JSON: `{metadata: {key: payload}, next_key: int, deleted: [int]}`
3. `{vector_store_path}_graph.json` — Entity graph nodes + edges
4. `{history_db_path}` — SQLite audit log

Memory API auto-manages all paths under `data_dir/`.

---

## Benchmarks Infrastructure

**Dataset:** LoCoMo format — multi-session conversations with categorized questions
**Categories:** 1=Single-hop, 2=Multi-hop, 3=Temporal, 4=Open-domain, 5=Unanswerable (skipped)

**Metrics (metrics.py):**
- `calculate_bleu1(reference, hypothesis)` — unigram precision
- `calculate_f1(reference, hypothesis)` — token-level F1
- `llm_judge(question, ground_truth, predicted)` — GPT-4o-mini Likert 1-5
- `binary_llm_judge(question, ground_truth, predicted)` — GPT-4o-mini binary 0/1

**CLI (run_benchmarks.py):**
```bash
python benchmarks/run_benchmarks.py \
    --dataset benchmarks/dataset/locomo10.json \
    --output reports \
    --compressor_type llmlingua2    # or: llm, compare
    --judge_mode both               # or: likert, binary
    --extractor_model gpt-4o-mini
    --compression_rate 0.6
    --top_k 10
```

`--compressor_type compare` runs both modes back-to-back with side-by-side results table.

---

## Key Architectural Decisions

1. **Token-level compression over LLM extraction** — eliminates per-call API cost
2. **4-signal hybrid retrieval** — dominant quality factor (~20pt improvement over single-signal)
3. **Local-only default** — all core ops offline; LLM extraction is opt-in
4. **Single storage backend** — USearch HNSW replaces complex multi-backend abstractions
5. **Entity graph for multi-hop** — enables relationship-based retrieval beyond keywords
6. **Raw text for BM25** — keyword search on uncompressed text for better recall
7. **Soft deletion** — avoids expensive full index rebuilds
8. **Adaptive compression** — short texts bypass compression to preserve every word
9. **Deterministic default** — same input always produces same memory (LLMLingua-2 mode)
10. **Auto-persistence** — Memory API removes manual save/load burden

---

## Class & Method Index

| Module | Class/Function | Purpose |
|--------|---------------|---------|
| fraction.client | Memory | High-level auto-persistence wrapper |
| fraction.memory | Fraction | Core memory engine |
| fraction.config | FractionConfig | All configuration options |
| fraction.types | CompressedFragment, MemoryItem, SearchResult, MemoryEvent | Data models |
| fraction.compressor | LLMLingua2Scorer | Default token compression |
| fraction.compressor | SelfInfoScorer | GPT-2 self-information scorer |
| fraction.compressor | EnsembleScorer | Weighted multi-scorer combination |
| fraction.compressor | LLMExtractorScorer | litellm-based fact extraction |
| fraction.compressor | build_compressor() | Factory function |
| fraction.embedder | SentenceTransformerEmbedder | BGE-base 768-dim embeddings |
| fraction.entity | EntityExtractor | spaCy NER + relationship triples |
| fraction.vector_store | USearchVectorStore | HNSW index + metadata |
| fraction.graph | EntityGraph | In-memory entity graph with JSON persistence |
| fraction.retriever | HybridRetriever | 4-signal RRF retrieval |
| fraction.storage | SQLiteHistory | Audit log via SQLAlchemy |
| fraction.utils | generate_id, content_hash, now_utc, format_messages | Helpers |
| benchmarks.metrics | calculate_bleu1, calculate_f1, llm_judge, binary_llm_judge | Evaluation |
| benchmarks.locomo | run_fraction_benchmark, build_report, generate_markdown_report | Benchmark runner |
| benchmarks.prompts | ANSWER_PROMPT, LLM_JUDGE_PROMPT, BINARY_JUDGE_PROMPT | Prompt templates |
